metadata.description: Clean initial direct-SPARQL ACE playbook for qwen25_coder_7b_instruct / nlp4re.

bullets.title: Use NLP4RE ORKG contribution pattern
bullets.content: For NLP4RE direct SPARQL, always connect papers to their contribution node and type the contribution with the NLP4RE contribution class before querying template fields.
bullets.avoid: Do not query NLP4RE template properties directly from ?paper unless the field is publication year.

bullets.title: Use full nested NLP4RE ORKG paths
bullets.content: For nested NLP4RE fields, bind the parent resource from the contribution before selecting the child field. Follow the same hierarchy as the Empire-Compass template.
bullets.avoid: Do not skip intermediate template nodes.
bullets.positive_pattern: Bind contribution, then nested evaluation/task/dataset nodes, then the requested answer.
